vibe: Friendly, trustworthy, modern, professional but slightly playful, calming yet vibrant.

fonts.usage: Headings, primary numbers, and brand text. Provides a clean, modern, and slightly rounded tech feel.
Body text, inputs, data tables. Highly readable with a friendly, soft geometric structure.

layout_strategy.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8 for containers. Gap-6 for grid items.
layout_strategy.borders_and_shadows: Containers must have rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl. Use soft, diffuse ambient shadows (e.g., shadow-sm or shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)]). Borders should be subtle (border border-stone-100).

Cashier_POS.layout: Grid split layout. Left (70%): Search bar + Camera scanner toggle + Quick items grid. Right (30%): Fixed Cart/Bill sidebar stretching full height.
Cashier_POS.cart_items: Must have prominent, circular (-) and (+) buttons with high contrast hover states. Display total boldly at the bottom.

Storage.layout: Control Room Grid. Top section: Search/Filter + Add New Item button. Main section: Dense but padded data table or bento grid of inventory items.
Storage.indicators: Use visual color pills for stock levels (e.g., red for low stock, green for healthy).

component_rules.inputs: Over-sized for easy clicking (h-12 or h-14). rounded-xl. Focus state: ring-2 ring-emerald-500/50 border-emerald-500.
component_rules.buttons: Chunky and soft. rounded-xl. Font-semibold. Always have a lighter text color hover transition.
component_rules.tables: Go cardless for the table itself, but wrap the table container in a rounded-2xl white background with generous padding.
component_rules.icons: Use lucide-react. Stroke width 2 for clear, friendly iconography.

testing.rules: All interactive elements, buttons, inputs, cart items, and totals MUST have a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='checkout-button', data-testid='cart-item-increase').

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Routing: Two main routes ('/cashier' and '/storage'). Include a simple, clean sidebar or top nav to switch between them.
2. State Management: Use a robust state for the cart and inventory. Items added to the cart must deduct from visible stock, and checkout must permanently reduce inventory stock.

3. Barcode Scanning: Implement 'html5-qrcode' or 'react-barcode-scanner' for webcam capability on both pages. For USB barcode scanners, standard text inputs should handle fast typing and auto-submit on 'Enter'.

4. Currency Formatting: All monetary values must be formatted in IQD (Iraqi Dinar) using Intl.NumberFormat('en-IQ', { style: 'currency', currency: 'IQD' }) or similar, displaying clearly without decimal fractions if not needed.
5. Form Fields for Storage: Name, Barcode (optional string), Buying Price (number), Selling Price (number), Supplier Name (string), Type (string - free text), Stock Quantity (number).
6. Motion: Use framer-motion for layout shifts in the cart (AnimatePresence when items are removed/added) and for modal dialogs when adding a new item in storage.
7. Mock Data: Pre-populate the storage with 10-15 realistic pharmacy items (e.g., Paracetamol, Amoxicillin, Vitamin C, Bandages) to demonstrate functionality immediately.

empty_states.description: Abstract pills image for empty state backgrounds or login if needed (optional)
